Code Review Guidelines: All code changes must be reviewed by at least one engineer before merging to the main branch, with two reviews required for changes to core infrastructure or authentication systems. Reviewers are expected to check for correctness, test coverage, adherence to style guidelines, security considerations, and meaningful commit messages. Authors should keep pull requests small and focused (ideally under 400 lines changed) to facilitate thorough review. Feedback should be constructive and specific; use the "suggestion" feature in GitHub to propose exact code changes rather than vague comments.
